description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single build stage and uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/jft/irrlicht_extended/clang:d091831e98b786768673ecc42dbf713eb5d47f9b for all jobs. Add a job named build:clang that runs in the build stage. In this job execute the commands `mkdir build && cd build`, then `cmake ".." && make -j $(nproc)`. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
